Event: The Underwater Adventure
Event Date: 01/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: D19


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Coral Reef Defender Daggers

When attacking, has a 12-13% chance of dealing 100-120% damage in 5 seconds.
Once in a while, marks the target of the attack for 5 sec. During this time, all attacks by the unit made against the marked target will deal additional physical damage equal to 200% of the dagger wielder's attack, stun it for 0,5 sec, and prevent it from gaining any buffs for 2 sec.
If the target has less than 50% health left when the mark expires, it explodes, dealing physical damage equal to 200% of the dagger wielder's attack to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it.

Requirements: 98-100
